description_long: This is a freestanding, multi-tiered shelving unit with a distinctive stepped design, featuring two taller side sections and a lower central section. The frame appears to be constructed from metal tubing, painted a dark green, providing structural support and a modern industrial aesthetic. Each section contains three rectangular wooden shelves with a rich brown finish, offering ample horizontal storage space. The open-back and open-side design allows for easy access from multiple angles, making it suitable for use as a display or storage unit in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The legs are slender and evenly spaced, ensuring stability while maintaining a lightweight appearance. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an open shelving system.
description: A freestanding, stepped metal and wood shelving unit with open sides and three tiers per section, ideal for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stepped design, three shelves per side, and open central section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical alignment of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the shelf depth and frame profile.
